subject: LU-3963 libcfs: convert LNET layer to linux list api

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

messages.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

(style) use of tabs vs. spaces is a little inconsistent, especially in changed declarations.  In some lines tabs are used everywhere, in others only at the beginnings of lines.  While I don't think it's important enough to -review, if this needs refresh it might be good to make it the same everywhere.

Patch Set 1:

After several hours of tabbing I just couldn't do anymore. I realized I missed a typo so I need to upload a new patch.
Uploaded patch set 2.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2

(2 comments)

I'm fine with the extra whitespace conversion, if it isn't going to cause conflicts with other patches (e.g. Dynamic LNET Config in particular).  If it can land, great.  If not, then it might need to be refreshed.

Patch Set 9:

change returned value of lnet_post_routed_recv_locked() from positive value to negative value broke Lnet router, I will post a patch to fix it.

parents.subject: LU-5002 flock: accept EDEADLK in sanityn test_74

commit.subject: LU-3963 libcfs: convert LNET layer to linux list api
commit.message:
LU-3963 libcfs: convert LNET layer to linux list api

This patch converts all cfs_list primitives to the linux api
for the LNET layer.

Change-Id: Id790b87d253db759edb921f4828f04b11bbe6fe9
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@gmail.com>
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/9369
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Amir Shehata <amir.shehata@intel.com>
